payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark stained wooden tall cabinet (wardrobe-style) with vertical recessed-panel doors and a matte finish; the right side of the unit is cut off by the crop indicating a partial view, with minor surface wear visible on panels — approximately 1.5 m from the camera.
